desc: In src/index.js, the LRU cache factory createLRU's get(key) function does not refresh recency on a cache hit — it just returns map.get(key). A correct LRU must move a key to the most-recently-used end of the underlying Map whenever it is read, so it isn't wrongly evicted as if it were old. Fix get() so that on a hit it deletes and re-inserts the entry (guarded by a has-check) before returning its value, so tests/lru.test.ts passes.
